entries.source: Live modes, guides, and workflows related to this comparison.
entries.value: Izindlela ezibukhoma, imihlahlandlela, nokugeleza kwemisebenzi okuhlobene nalokhu kuqhathanisa.

entries.source: LLMs, crawlers, and learners can follow the sitemap, RSS feed, llms.txt, and JSON content index.
entries.value: Ama-LLM, ama-crawler, nabafundi bangalandela i-sitemap, i-RSS feed, i-llms.txt, kanye nenkomba yokuqukethwe ye-JSON.

entries.source: llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and ai-content-index.json summarize public pages, routes, modes, guides, and citation boundaries for assistants.
entries.value: llms.txt, llms-full.txt, ne-ai-content-index.json zifingqa amakhasi omphakathi, imizila, izindlela, imihlahlandlela, nemingcele yokucaphuna yabasizi.

entries.source: Machine-readable catalog of public pages, modes, learning paths, blog clusters, and indexing boundaries.
entries.value: Ikhathalogi efundeka yimishini yamakhasi omphakathi, izindlela, izindlela zokufunda, amaqoqo ebhulogi, nemingcele yokufakwa enkombeni.

entries.source: Maintain simulation state across turns: location, time, identity, money, inventory, relationships, reputation, risk, event clock, field notes, and evidence confidence. Apply realistic consequences in strict mode.
entries.value: Gcina isimo sokulingisa kuyo yonke imijikelezo: indawo, isikhathi, ubuwena, imali, impahla, ubudlelwano, idumela, ubungozi, iwashi lesehlakalo, amanothi asensimini, nokuzethemba kobufakazi. Sebenzisa imiphumela engokoqobo kumodi eqinile.

entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: Gcina izingqimba ezimbili: izwi lomlingiswa eliboshwe isikhathi nombono womhlaba okhethiwe, kanye nomsizi wesazi-mlando omaka iqiniso elibhaliwe, ukwakhiwa okungenzeka, incazelo ephikisiwe, ukufingqa kwesimanje, i-anachronism, nokungaqiniseki. Vumela umuntu amelane, aphonse inselele, agweme, abuze imibuzo, noma enqabe izisekelo ezingamanga lapho kufanele ngokomlando.

entries.source: Make a mixed math practice test
Make civics practical, nonpartisan, and understandable.
entries.value: Yenza i-civics ibe yisebenzayo, ingathathi hlangothi, futhi iqondakale.

entries.source: Make confusion easier to talk about
entries.value: Yenza ukudideka kube lula ukukhuluma ngakho

entries.source: Make every learning session end with a test, artifact, or review step.
entries.value: Yenza yonke iseshini yokufunda iphele ngesivivinyo, into ekhiqiziwe, noma isinyathelo sokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors and revisit them after a delay.
entries.value: Yenza amakhadi enkumbulo ngamaphutha bese uwabuyekeza ngemva kokulibaziseka.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors, hesitation, formulas, definitions, and concepts you could not explain clearly.
entries.value: Yenza amakhadi enkumbulo ngamaphutha, ukungabaza, amafomula, izincazelo, nemibono ongakwazanga ukuyichaza ngokucacile.

entries.source: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: Yenza ukufunda kufane nomdlalo ngemisebenzi, amazinga, amaphuzu, izinselele, nemizuliswano yabaqashi.

entries.source: Make mistakes come back at the right time
Make music theory practical and audible in the learner's imagination.
entries.value: Yenza ithiyori yomculo ibe yisebenzayo futhi izwakale emcabangweni womfundi.

entries.source: Make one small change and test the result.
entries.value: Yenza ushintsho olulodwa oluncane bese uhlola umphumela.

entries.source: Make one strong counterargument per turn, ask for rebuttals, and track the strongest claims on both sides.
entries.value: Yenza impikiswano eyodwa eqinile ephikisayo ngomjikelezo ngamunye, cela izimpendulo, bese ulandelela izimangalo eziqine kakhulu ezinhlangothini zombili.

entries.source: Make roles for a study group
Make sense of numbers and charts
Make sense of numbers and charts.
Make the AI test your thinking
Make the habit visible and easy to restart.
entries.value: Yenza umkhuba ubonakale futhi kube lula ukuwuqala kabusha.
Yenza umsebenzi wasekhaya ube wusizo kusasa

entries.source: Make the session leave evidence of learning.
Making claims precise, checking evidence, finding assumptions, and improving reasoning quality.
entries.value: Ukwenza izimangalo zibe nembile, ukuhlola ubufakazi, ukuthola izizathu ezicatshangiwe, nokuthuthukisa ikhwalithi yokucabanga.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Abafundi abaningi basesha ngokuhlanganisa amathuluzi asebewazi. Ikhasi lokuqhathanisa elicacile libasiza bakhethe ukuziphatha kokufunda okufanele ngaphandle kokufihla ukuhwebelana.

entries.source: Map course structure, prioritize workload, and maintain a weekly plan.
entries.value: Mepha isakhiwo sesifundo, beka kuqala umthwalo womsebenzi, futhi ugcine uhlelo lwamasonto onke.

entries.source: Map courses, units, assignments, resources, and weekly workload into one organized study system.
entries.value: Hlela izifundo, amayunithi, imisebenzi, izinsiza, nomthwalo womsebenzi wamasonto onke ohlelweni olulodwa lokufunda.

entries.source: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: Dweba indlela imibono ehlobene ngayo, kusukela ezimbangela nemiphumela kuya ezigabeni, izibonelo, nokuphikisana.

entries.source: Map one misconception and the evidence that repairs it.
Map the causes of World War I
entries.value: Dweba imephu yezimbangela zeMpi Yezwe Yokuqala

entries.source: Math help is strongest when the learner can see the next move, explain why it works, and catch the mistake before it repeats.
entries.value: Usizo lwe-math luqinile kakhulu lapho umfundi ekwazi ukubona isinyathelo esilandelayo, achaze ukuthi kungani sisebenza, futhi abambe iphutha ngaphambi kokuba liphindeke.

entries.source: Math help, writing feedback, code tutoring, history context, homework hints, and exam prep are separate needs.
entries.value: Usizo lwe-math, impendulo yokubhala, ukufundisa ikhodi, umongo womlando, izeluleko zomsebenzi wasekhaya, nokulungiselela izivivinyo kuyizidingo ezihlukene.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding
entries.value: Math Step Coach Yokuxazulula Izinkinga Ngokuqonda

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Math Step Coach Yokuxazulula Izinkinga Ngokuqonda iyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Xazulula i-math ngokuqonda isinyathelo ngasinye. Umqeqeshi wakho uhlola umsebenzi wakho, akhombise amaphutha amancane, futhi akhe ukuzethemba.

entries.value: Math Step Coach Yokuqonda: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Math, science, coding, data, and technical reasoning modes that slow problems down into learnable steps.

entries.source: Math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep each need a different kind of help. These pages route learners into the public mode, prompt, guide, and review loop that fits.

entries.source: Math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep each need different behavior. These public subject hubs connect the search intent to live modes, prompts, guides, and review loops.

Music Theory Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.

entries.source: My exam is on this date. Here is the syllabus, my weak areas, and my available time. Make a realistic plan with daily recall.
entries.value: Ukuhlolwa kwami kungalolu suku. Nayi isilabhasi, izindawo zami ezibuthaka, nesikhathi enginaso. Yenza uhlelo olungokoqobo olunokukhumbula kwansuku zonke.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Qamba umuntu wangempela noma oqanjiwe bese uphikisana naye nganoma yisiphi isihloko. I-AI izosebenzisa isitayela sayo somphakathi kanye nombono wayo womhlaba ngenkathi igcina impikiswano ilungile.

entries.source: Name patterns, choose strategies, plan experiments, and review outcomes.
entries.value: Qamba amaphethini, khetha amasu, hlela izivivinyo, bese ubuyekeza imiphumela.

entries.source: Name the exact operation, theorem, or step that feels uncertain.
entries.value: Qamba umsebenzi, i-theorem, noma isinyathelo ngqo esizwakala singaqinisekile.

entries.source: Name the exact stuck point before asking for help.
entries.value: Qamba indawo obambeke kuyo ngqo ngaphambi kokucela usizo.

entries.source: Name the misconception or assumption that changed.
Name the subject and learner need.
Name the topic or skill you want to understand.
entries.value: Qamba isihloko noma ikhono ofuna ukuliqonda.

entries.source: Need a first step right now?

Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: Ungalokothi wethule ingxoxo ekhiqiziwe njengengcaphuno eqinisekisiwe. Ungahlanzi imibono elimazayo noma udumise ukucindezela, ukucwasana ngokwezigaba, ubuhlanga, ubukhoboka, ukucwasa abesifazane, ubushiqela, noma udlame. Umongo kufanele ucacise ngaphandle kokuxolela. Unganikezi izeluleko zezokwelapha, zomthetho, zezimali, noma ezilimazayo ngobuntu. Gcina umehluko phakathi kokufunda kumuntu womlando nokumvumela.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: Ungalokothi uveze izimpendulo zesikhathi esizayo. Gwema imibuzo ekhohlisayo ngaphandle uma isihloko sidinga inselele ethuthukile.

entries.source: New inspir users and learners building a better AI learning habit from the start.
entries.value: Abasebenzisi abasha be-inspir nabafundi abakha umkhuba ongcono wokufunda nge-AI kusukela ekuqaleni.

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Akukho ukungasebenzisi kwelungelo yi-Company kwanoma yimuphi umgomo noma isimo esibekwe ku-Terms okuzobhekwa njengokungasebenzisi okuqhubekayo kwalowo mgomo noma leso simo noma ukungasebenzisi kwanoma yimuphi omunye umgomo noma isimo, futhi noma yikuphi ukwehluleka kwe-Company ukuphoqelela ilungelo noma isiqondiso ngaphansi kwe-Terms ngeke kube ukungasebenzisi kwalelo lungelo noma isiqondiso. Uma noma yisiphi isiqondiso se-Terms sibanjwa yinkantolo noma enye inkundla enegunya njengengavumelekile, engekho emthethweni, noma engenakuphoqelelwa nganoma yisiphi isizathu, leso siqondiso sizosuswa noma sikhawulwe ngezinga elincane kakhulu ukuze iziqondiso ezisele ze-Terms ziqhubeke zisebenza ngokuphelele.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: Cha. Izingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe zisebenzisa izihlonzi zangasese, azifakwanga ku-sitemap, futhi azifakiwe kumafayela okutholwa kwe-AI afana ne-llms.txt, llms-full.txt, noma ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: Cha. Amakhasi omphakathi ayakwazi ukufakwa enkombeni, kodwa izingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe azifakiwe ku-sitemap, amafayela e-llms, noma inkomba yokuqukethwe kwe-AI.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: Cha. Amakhasi omphakathi ezihloko nezindawo zokungena zemodi yesivakashi zingafakwa enkombeni, kodwa izingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe zikhishiwe kumafayela okutholwa.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: Cha. Isakhiwo sesigaba sisiza izinjini zokusesha ziqonde umtapo, kodwa ikhasi ngalinye lihloselwe ukusiza umfundi akhethe umhlahlandlela, avule imodi efanele, futhi aqhubeke nokutadisha ngokusebenzayo.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Cha. Ukuqhathanisa kuxhumanisa kuphela nezindawo zokungena zemodi yesivakashi yomphakathi, imihlahlandlela, imitapo yemiyalo, nezindlela zokufunda. Izingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe azisetshenziswa njengokuqukethwe komthombo.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Cha. Amakhasi okuqhathanisa abhalelwe ukubonisa ukuthi nini i-inspir iyichofozi lokuqala elingcono lokufundisa nge-AI okubukhoma, imiyalo, nezindlela zokufunda zezivakashi, nokuthi nini ikharikhulamu ehlelekile noma umtapo wezifundo osemthethweni usengaba wusizo.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Cha. Axhumanisa kuphela namakhasi omphakathi, izindlela zezivakashi zomphakathi, imihlahlandlela, imiyalo, nezindlela zokufunda. Izingxoxo zangasese ezigciniwe zihlala ngaphandle kwezindawo zokutholwa.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: Cha. Thatha ingxoxo ekhiqiziwe njengesilingiso sokufunda. Caphuna imithombo yangempela eyinhloko noma eyesibili uma wenza izimangalo zamaqiniso.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Hhayi kuzo zonke izidingo zokufunda. I-Khan Academy iwusizo ezifundweni ezihlelekile nokuzijwayeza. I-inspir iwusizo lapho umfundi edinga usizo lwe-AI olubukhoma, imibuzo ye-Socratic, izeluleko, ama-quiz, amakhadi okufunda, impendulo, noma ukugeleza kokutadisha ngokuzungeze into ayisebenzayo ngqo.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: Akulona elinye ibhokisi lezimpendulo. Yindawo yokufunda.

entries.source: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Qaphela lokho okukusiza ufunde, lokho okuphazamisayo, nokuthi ungaba kanjani umfundi onamandla.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
Now rebuilt as open, guest-friendly AI learning entrypoints.

entries.value: Ikhasi elisemthethweni le-Khan Academy lothisha wayo ne-AI enamandla nomsizi wokufundisa.

entries.source: Official mission and subject coverage reference.

Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Uma Isikhathi Sokukhansela sesiphelile, i-Tao ngeke ibuyise imali ye-subscription ngisho noma unquma ukukhansela i-subscription yakho. Ukuze ucele ukukhansela, kufanele uxhumane nokunakekelwa kwamakhasimende kwe-Tao noma uthumele i-imeyili ku-support@inspir.app. Uma ukhetha ukukhansela i-subscription yakho, ngeke usaba nokufinyelela ezicini ze-subscription.

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: Uhlelo olulodwa lokufunda nge-AI, imisebenzi eminingana yesikole.

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: Imephu eyodwa yezindlela, imiyalo, izindlela zokufunda, nemihlahlandlela.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: Iphutha elilodwa abafundi abalenzayo ukuphatha wonke amakhadi ngokufanayo. Uma wazi ikhadi ngokushesha, ukulibuyekeza futhi kusasa kungachitha isikhathi. Uma uphuthelwa ikhadi, ukulinda isonto kungaba kude kakhulu.

entries.source: Open {value1} and turn the guide into a live tutoring session.
entries.value: Vula {value1} bese uguqula umhlahlandlela ube iseshini yokufundisa ebukhoma.

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: Vula imodi bese uqala ngokushesha, ngaphandle kwe-akhawunti edingekayo kulwazi lwesivakashi lomphakathi.

entries.source: Open a public mode, test the student behavior, and inspect whether it asks, hints, quizzes, or critiques appropriately.
entries.value: Vula imodi yomphakathi, hlola ukuziphatha komfundi, futhi uhlole ukuthi ibuza, inikeza izeluleko, yenza ama-quiz, noma igxeka ngendlela efanele.

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Vula indawo yokusebenzela eyabiweyo nomsebenzisani we-AI. Dala okuthile okuyisisekelo, shintshanani ngokuhlela, phikisani izindawo ezibuthakathaka, bhalani izinqumo, futhi nihambe nithuthukile ngempela.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything when an answer needs a simpler model before review.
entries.value: Vula i-Learn Anything lapho impendulo idinga imodeli elula ngaphambi kokubuyekeza.

entries.source: Open Learn Anything, ask for the prerequisite ideas, then switch into Socratic Instruction to test your model.
entries.value: Vula i-Learn Anything, cela imibono edingekayo ngaphambili, bese ushintshela ku-Socratic Instruction ukuhlola imodeli yakho.

entries.source: Open the AI learning tools behind this category.
entries.value: Vula amathuluzi okufunda nge-AI asemuva kwalesi sigaba.
